name: Roper Technologies
confidenceReason: Best Sharpe in portfolio (0.60). >20% discount to DCF fair value. CSU-style M&A playbook at massive relative discount. Stabilizing anchor.
bullCase: Roper executes the exact Constellation Software M&A playbook but trades at a massive relative discount to both the software sector and its compounding peers. It provides highly predictable, low-leverage compounding torque as a stabilizing portfolio anchor.
bearCase: Slower organic growth compared to hyper-growth SaaS peers. Relies heavily on continuous M&A execution to drive the bottom line.

cagrModel.basis: Serial acquirer of niche software; forward PE reflects recent acquisition dilution; exit PE 35 reflects historical 10yr avg for asset-light compounders
